provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female ship mechanic in her early 20s with braided hair and a smudge of reactor coolant on her cheek, wearing khaki shipboard coveralls zipped up to the throat with the ship name stenciled on the breast pocket, a thin tool belt with precision instruments, lightweight deck shoes, safety glasses pushed up on her forehead, the coveralls are clean because she is new and careful, a trainee badge visible on the shoulder
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Young female mechanic in khaki coveralls, engine room. Braided hair, clean coveralls because she is new. Trainee read works.
